first_screen_strategy: A product world is expressed through one oversized editorial gesture.
negative_space: High on mobile; moderate on desktop.
geometry: Sharp utility labels around playful objects.
mobile_transformation: Collapses to a small menu and a single visual gesture.
transferable_pattern: Let one distinctive object carry character; keep the shell unboxed.
failure_if_copied: Eccentricity without an equally legible offer would look ornamental.

first_screen_strategy: Featured products lead; a short sentence interprets the current object.
geometry: Soft organic product fields with crisp type.
mobile_transformation: Stacks product content; automated mobile word count overcounts overlapping responsive content.
transferable_pattern: Lead with one tangible work item and a plain-language description.
failure_if_copied: A carousel or playful divider without a mature portfolio would add motion but not trust.

first_screen_strategy: An illustrated world doubles as navigation.
proof_type: A visible body of handmade projects and writing.
geometry: Organic illustration with minimal interface chrome.
mobile_transformation: Preserves the illustrated navigation and removes secondary content.
transferable_pattern: Personality can live in one authored visual language instead of many panels.
failure_if_copied: Imitating the illustration style would copy identity rather than transfer structure.

first_screen_strategy: A concrete visual or artefact occupies the larger field; a short interpretation sits beside it.
geometry: Loose editorial composition; no container grid.
accent_colour_role: Neutral shell lets the proof image lead.
mobile_transformation: The proof stays first; labels simplify rather than merely stacking a desktop column.
transferable_pattern: Closest transferable split: proof plus concise interpretation.
failure_if_copied: Using an abstract visual instead of real evidence would turn the same structure into theatre.

first_screen_strategy: A photographed physical environment and thesis replace a conventional sales hero.
right_side_role: The environment itself is the counterweight.
proof_type: Real rooms, objects, and public activity.
accent_colour_role: Colour comes from the physical evidence.
transferable_pattern: When the work is unfamiliar, concrete reality can explain more than diagrams.
failure_if_copied: Removing the CTA works only when reputation or deep reading is already expected.

first_screen_strategy: Editorial content and the newest article lead immediately.
proof_type: Published research and operational solar-site constraint.
geometry: Simple grid with a few rules rather than card boxes.
mobile_transformation: Prioritises the newest article and shortens navigation.
transferable_pattern: A single rule and content hierarchy can replace card framing.
failure_if_copied: High information density would overwhelm a homepage with little published material.

first_screen_strategy: A large literal proposition is paired with a short mission statement.
right_side_role: Context; a proof / manifesto panel follows below.
proof_type: Named research and a working product.
geometry: Large type, restrained rounded evidence panel.
accent_colour_role: Very restrained; hierarchy is mostly typographic.
mobile_transformation: Drops the framed panel and keeps proposition before routes.
transferable_pattern: Make the category and route fluent while leaving the thesis ambitious.
failure_if_copied: Borrowing its institutional tone would falsely imply team scale.

first_screen_strategy: A forceful claim overlays real product-interface imagery.
right_side_role: Product proof is the background, not a second explanation.
accent_colour_role: High-contrast image and small signal colours.
mobile_transformation: Navigation becomes a dense list before the hero, which is a caution for Final Prime.
transferable_pattern: Put a real system behind the claim if it can be understood at a glance.
failure_if_copied: Militarised tone and dense mobile navigation could feel hostile or corporate.

first_screen_strategy: A dense mosaic of products and disciplines demonstrates breadth.
proof_type: Decades of shipped tools and research.
geometry: Dense modular mosaic with many rules.
accent_colour_role: Category colours distinguish mature product families.
mobile_transformation: Reduces visible text but keeps the dense corpus.
transferable_pattern: A real, legible body of work can itself be authority.
failure_if_copied: Without a comparable corpus this pattern reads as borrowed scale and clutter.

first_screen_strategy: A sparse dark proposition floats above subtle product UI.
right_side_role: Product UI is latent proof below the claim.
proof_type: Real product interface and customer use.
negative_space: High in the hero despite many measured internal frames.
accent_colour_role: Cool light is confined to product depth and focus.
mobile_transformation: Retains claim, action, and product glimpse in that order.
transferable_pattern: Negative space can amplify one exact sentence when the product proof is nearby.
failure_if_copied: A blurred or decorative mock UI with no real product would undermine credibility.

first_screen_strategy: Three roles: offer on the left, symbol in the centre, concrete qualifiers on the right.
proof_type: Product ecosystem, customers, and working deployment platform.
geometry: Crisp geometric grid with one central symbol.
accent_colour_role: Mostly monochrome; colour is not required for hierarchy.
mobile_transformation: Collapses the triad into claim then actions; qualifiers are reduced.
transferable_pattern: A right-side orientation signal can work if it is shorter than the main claim.
failure_if_copied: The central symbol becomes empty branding if it has no semantic connection.

first_screen_strategy: A precise value proposition and immediate CTA sit beside a large colour gesture.
geometry: Clean typography with a fluid gradient field.
accent_colour_role: Colour owns the atmosphere; actions remain legible.
mobile_transformation: Keeps the proposition and CTA first; automated mobile count includes later / duplicated responsive text.
transferable_pattern: Separate the job of clarity from the job of atmosphere.
failure_if_copied: A generic gradient would add polish without distinctiveness or proof.

first_screen_strategy: A product campaign sits behind an intrusive regional cookie layer during audit.
negative_space: Not reliably assessable because of the modal.
geometry: Industrial dot typography and large product fields.
mobile_transformation: Modal dominates both sizes, so hierarchy transfer is not inferable from this capture.
transferable_pattern: Distinctive type can support identity when the product remains concrete.
failure_if_copied: Consent and region overlays can erase the intended first impression entirely.

first_screen_strategy: An immersive generative surface carries nearly all atmosphere; three central actions orient the user.
right_side_role: The visual field is the experience.
proof_type: Live community output and a working tool.
geometry: Organic image field with compact pill controls.
accent_colour_role: Colour belongs to generated content and action states.
mobile_transformation: Preserves the same three routes with little copy.
transferable_pattern: A mysterious surface remains usable when one unmistakable exploration route is centred.
failure_if_copied: Without live output and product recognition this would look like an unexplained screensaver.

first_screen_strategy: Full-bleed project media carries the claim and portfolio entry points.
negative_space: Low visually because imagery fills the canvas; low chrome density.
geometry: Large cinematic fields and minimal interface framing.
mobile_transformation: Project reel remains primary; global navigation is reduced.
transferable_pattern: Let a selected work be the visual world rather than surrounding it with explanation.
failure_if_copied: Cinematic media without documented outcomes would bias toward spectacle.

first_screen_strategy: Interactive WebGL experience plus minimal work navigation.
negative_space: High chrome-space; immersive media fills the rest.
mobile_transformation: Keeps the same minimal routes; screenshot capture timed out twice, so visual comparison is limited.
transferable_pattern: If the medium itself is the service, interaction can be evidence.
failure_if_copied: For a software/research founder an opaque WebGL intro could hide the actual field and harm accessibility.

first_screen_strategy: Fullscreen artwork or news media is paired with a small title and explicit Read / Learn route.
geometry: Immersive field with a compact outlined action.
accent_colour_role: A single fuchsia band / artwork colour controls emphasis.
mobile_transformation: Preserves media, title, and one action; secondary navigation recedes.
transferable_pattern: One proof object can carry mystery if its title and route stay literal.
failure_if_copied: Dark empty loading states can resemble broken content and fail the first five seconds.

first_screen_strategy: A fullscreen interactive scene exposes only one route.
right_side_role: The experience is the entire hero.
geometry: Organic WebGL form with almost no interface geometry.
transferable_pattern: A lone explicit route can orient an otherwise strange atmosphere.
failure_if_copied: Final Prime lacks enough category recognition for three words and an opaque scene to be safe.
